description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:16.04 Docker image with a before_script that runs `apt-get -qq update && apt-get -qq install -y lua5.3 make` and `lua5.3 -v`. Define a single stage test and three jobs: test_diff runs `echo -e "\033[36mBuilding initial compiler\033[0m"`, `make LUA=lua5.3 all`, `echo -e "\033[36mBuilding compiler using new compiler\033[0m"`, `make LUA=lua5.3 all`, `echo -e "\033[36mComparing output of compiler\033[0m"`, sets `TEMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d)`, runs `make LUA=lua5.3 OUT_DIR="$TEMP_DIR" all`, and asserts `! (diff -rq "$TEMP_DIR" bin | grep "$TEMP_DIR")`; test_docs runs `echo -e "\033[36mBuilding initial compiler\033[0m"`, `make LUA=lua5.3 all`, `echo -e "\033[36mGenerating docs\033[0m"`, `make LUA=lua5.3 docs`; test_run runs `echo -e "\033[36mBuilding initial compiler\033[0m"`, `make LUA=lua5.3 all`, `echo -e "\033[36mRunning tests\033[0m"`, `make LUA=lua5.3 -k test`. All jobs are in the test stage with no artifacts, caches, or special rules.
